MODULE: cosmos.memory.semantic_layers
FILE: cosmos/memory/semantic_layers.py (720 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Semantic Memory Layers - Concept Hierarchy and Knowledge Distillation

Q1 2025 Feature: Semantic Memory Layers
- Automatic concept hierarchy extraction
- Abstract knowledge distillation
- Cross-domain connection discovery
- Multi-level abstraction

CLASSES:
- AbstractionLevel(Enum): Levels of semantic abstraction.
- SemanticConcept: A concept at any abstraction level.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'SemanticConcept'
- DomainCluster: A cluster of related concepts forming a domain.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- CrossDomainConnection: A connection between concepts across domains.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- SemanticLayerSystem: Multi-level semantic memory with concept hierarchies.

Features:
- Automatic con
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def add_instance(self, content: str, context: Optional[str]=None, domain_hint: Optional[str]=N
  Methods: async def get_concept_hierarchy(self, concept_id: str, depth: int=3) -> dict
  Methods: async def find_analogies(self, concept_id: str, max_results: int=5) -> list[dict]
  Methods: async def query_semantic(self, query: str, min_level: AbstractionLevel=AbstractionLevel.INSTANCE, ma
  Methods: async def create_domain(self, name: str, description: str, seed_concepts: Optional[list[str]]=None) 
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
